title: HR Welcome Session
description: Introduction to company culture, benefits, and HR processes. Learn about company values, HR policies, and available resources.

title: Security Training
description: Mandatory security awareness training covering data protection, password security, and compliance requirements.

title: Team Introduction
description: Meet your team members and understand team workflows, processes, and project overview.

title: Manager 1:1
description: Weekly one-on-one meeting with your manager to discuss progress, challenges, and career development.

title: Product Demo
description: Demonstrate your work or side project to the product team for feedback and visibility.

title: Tech Review
description: Technical review of your architecture, code quality, and technical decisions with senior engineers.

title: Sales Kickoff
description: Review quarterly sales targets, strategies, and pipeline overview with the sales leadership.

title: Marketing Planning
description: Marketing campaign planning and coordination session for upcoming quarter.

title: Compliance Training
description: Mandatory compliance and ethics training covering industry regulations and company policies.

title: All Hands
description: Company-wide all hands meeting where leadership shares updates and celebrates achievements.
